function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Precompute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Precompute suffix_T

    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original count

    let original = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original += prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Precompute sum_T_after_C array

    const sum_T_after_C = new Array(n + 2).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            sum_T_after_C[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_T_after_C[i+1];

        } else {

            sum_T_after_C[i] = sum_T_after_C[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Now compute max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T

    let max_insert_L = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        // inserting L at position i, the increase is sum_T_after_C[i+1]

        // because sum_T_after_C[i+1] is the sum of T_after_C for all Cs in s[i+1 ... n-1]

        const increase = sum_T_after_C[i+1];

        if (increase > max_insert_L) {

            max_insert_L = increase;

        }

    }

    let max_insert_C = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const increase = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

        if (increase > max_insert_C) {

            max_insert_C = increase;

        }

    }

    let max_insert_T = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const increase = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i];

        if (increase > max_insert_T) {

            max_insert_T = increase;

        }

    }

    const max_increase = Math.max(max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T);

    return original + max_increase;

}

function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Precompute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_T[i+1] = prefix_T[i] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Precompute suffix_T

    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original count

    let original = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original += prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Precompute sum_T_after_C array

    const sum_T_after_C = new Array(n + 2).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            sum_T_after_C[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_T_after_C[i+1];

        } else {

            sum_T_after_C[i] = sum_T_after_C[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Now compute max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T

    let max_insert_L = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        // inserting L at position i, the increase is sum_T_after_C[i+1]

        // because sum_T_after_C[i+1] is the sum of T_after_C for all Cs in s[i+1 ... n-1]

        const increase = sum_T_after_C[i+1];

        if (increase > max_insert_L) {

            max_insert_L = increase;

        }

    }

    let max_insert_C = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const increase = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

        if (increase > max_insert_C) {

            max_insert_C = increase;

        }

    }

    let max_insert_T = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const increase = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i];

        if (increase > max_insert_T) {

            max_insert_T = increase;

        }

    }

    const max_increase = Math.max(max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T);

    return original + max_increase;

}
